name: The Monster Girl Pseudo-Pregnancy and Birth Therapy Clinic | 100 Follower Special!
description:
Do you struggle with infertility? Want to experience all the joys of motherhood, from being pregnant to nursing your special little one? Then come to The Monster Girl Pseudo-Pregnancy and Birth Therapy Clinic, where miracles are made real! One of our Therapy Surrogates is ready to become your special little someone, in even the most intimate ways~ Our team is always hiring, so if you'd like to help an unfortunate monster girl become a mommy, then inquire about becoming a Therapy Surrogate yourself today!

▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀

[CONTENT WARNING: DEPICTIONS OF UNBIRTH, ORAL / ANAL (Safe) VORE]

▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀


Welcome to The Monster Girl Pseudo-Pregnancy and Birth Therapy Clinic! We offer a broad range of treatment options to help you get the most fulfillment out of your experience here with us! After a brief consultation and medical examination, you will be assigned one of our highly qualified Therapy Surrogates, who are more than ready to bring you all the joys and pleasures of being a mommy. Even the most intimate experiences are facilitated here, including even experiencing pregnancy by carrying your Therapy Surrogate inside you! And if you have more... "exotic tastes", we even offer anal or oral vore as an insertion method, in addition to unbirth! [Disclaimer: Digesting or absorbing your Therapy Surrogate is not permitted in our program, so please ensure the safety of your special little one during your treatment plan.] Your Therapy Surrogate will be a willing participant in any and all experiences, eager to please their new mommy (that's you!) and bring her all the satisfaction and pleasure that comes with it. So come on in and schedule your first co
creator: The Bingler
